description: User profile and preferences: display name editing, currency preference (MXN/USD), account info display (role, member since), admin badge for super admins, and logout functionality.

subDeliverables.title: Display name editing
subDeliverables.description: Editable display name field on the settings page, saved to ft_profiles.display_name.
acceptanceCriteria: Display name shown in editable input
Save button persists change to database
Updated name reflected across the app

subDeliverables.title: Currency preference
subDeliverables.description: Currency selector allowing users to choose between MXN and USD. Preference stored in ft_profiles.currency and used throughout the app for formatting.
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle or select between MXN and USD
Currency used in formatCurrency throughout app

subDeliverables.title: Account info display
subDeliverables.description: Read-only display of account information: user role and member since date derived from profile created_at.
acceptanceCriteria: Member since date formatted from created_at

subDeliverables.title: Admin badge for super admins
subDeliverables.description: Visual badge indicator shown next to user name when is_super_admin is true on the profile.
acceptanceCriteria: Badge visible when is_super_admin is true
Styled consistently with app design system

subDeliverables.title: Logout functionality
subDeliverables.description: Logout button that calls Supabase signOut(), clears the session, and redirects to the login page.
